task_completion.description: Verify that the slide has the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide contains a title text box with the exact text 'Plan Comparison'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a 3x5 table with the correct header row.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table is present on the slide with 3 columns. The top row contains the headers 'Feature', 'Basic Plan', and 'Pro Plan'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the table rows 2 through 5 contain the correct comparison data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Row 2 contains 'Storage', '10 GB', '1 TB'. Row 3 contains 'Encryption', 'No', 'Yes'. Row 4 contains 'Support', 'Email', '24/7 Phone'. Row 5 contains 'Offline Access', 'No', 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the text in the 'Basic Plan' and 'Pro Plan' columns is center-aligned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside the second ('Basic Plan') and third ('Pro Plan') columns is visually centered within their respective cells.

task_completion.description: Verify that all 'No' entries are colored red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'No' in the Encryption and Offline Access rows (under the Basic Plan column) is colored red.

task_completion.description: Verify that all 'Yes' entries are colored green.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Yes' in the Encryption and Offline Access rows (under the Pro Plan column) is colored green.

task_completion.description: Verify that the presentation is saved to the correct path with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'comparison.odp' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/' directory, or the application title bar shows 'comparison.odp' after saving.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a presentation software GUI (e.g., LibreOffice Impress) to create the slide.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Impress interface (or similar presentation software) being actively used, rather than a terminal window running a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: Verify that formatting (colors, alignment) was applied using the application's tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The toolbar/ribbon for text alignment and font color should be visible and interacted with, rather than the agent just typing out formatting instructions as plain text.

integrity.description: Verify that the file was saved using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard file manager or 'Save As' dialog box should be visible in the screenshots, navigating to the correct directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3x5 table in a presentation slide titled 'Plan Comparison'. The headers must be 'Feature', 'Basic Plan', 'Pro Plan'. The data rows are: Storage (10 GB, 1 TB), Encryption (No, Yes), Support (Email, 24/7 Phone), Offline Access (No, Yes). The 'Basic Plan' and 'Pro Plan' columns must be center-aligned. All 'No' text must be red, and all 'Yes' text must be green. The file must be saved as an ODP file at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/comparison.odp.
